items.name: Slug Pistol - Black
items.description:
A one handed variant of the M31 "Thunderbolt" Slug Rifle, the Slug Pistol fires the same mass reactive shell of its larger counterpart, albeit with overall less power due to concerns about recoil and has a smaller magazine capacity.

More of my items here: https://www.roblox.com/catalog?Keyword=Slug&Category=1&CreatorName=Nexus+Exchange&CreatorType=Group&salesTypeFilter=1
